results.name: Figure AI
results.key_finding: Federal whistleblower suit (Gruendel, N.D. Cal.) alleges Figure had no formal safety procedures or incident-reporting, robots tested at more than 2x the force needed to fracture a human skull, an investor-approved home-deployment safety roadmap downgraded after the ~$39B round, and the safety lead terminated after escalating; drives AWR/BND/ACC/INT 2.5->2.0. Stays Developing.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: FAO-WFP/IPC: ~15,000 in Borno State at risk of IPC/CH Phase 5 Catastrophe (Jun-Aug 2026 lean season) and 34.8M at CH Phase 3+; IRC calls it 'entirely man-made' and 'entirely preventable'. State scored as failing to prevent/prioritize, not primary perpetrator -> ACT/ACC/SYS/INT/AWR shaved. Sub-5pt composite delta BUT crosses Developing->Critical band boundary (designation change).

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG coalition opened a formal investigation (NY AG subpoena Jun 12) covering sycophancy, minors/seniors, health data, advertising, engagement design. Genuine ACC/INT pressure but an opened probe, not adjudicated harm; -4.7 stays below the 5-pt threshold and within Developing. Re-flag on charges/findings.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: IAM NLRB unfair-labor-practice charge over the Jun 20 Towson unionized-store closure (78 workers; alleged transfer-rights disparity vs non-union closures), backed by 54 Congressional Labor Caucus members and MD Gov. Moore. A real I3 signal but a single pre-adjudication contested charge against Apple's broad published supply-chain responsibility infrastructure. Sub-threshold.

results.name: Humana
results.key_finding: Scanner re-surfaced the Senate PSI/HHS-OIG denial-rate evidence that already drove yesterday's applied downgrade (51.6->40.6 on 2026-06-18); no genuinely new June-2026 Humana-specific federal action confirmed. No incremental scorable downside. Remains on boundary watch (0.6pt above Developing/Functional boundary).

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Overnight Jun 18-19 strikes (Dnipro) and UN 'highest civilian-fatality month in 3 years' are harm ON Ukraine BY Russia (victim attribution to Russia). Ukraine's own profile (mobilization-coercion and activist-raid concerns offset by responsive civil society reversing anti-corruption legislation, plus an active 2026 HRP) unchanged. Confirms at Functional 50.0.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: UNRWA Sit-Rep 226/HRW (Jun 2026): 82.6% of Gaza in militarized zones or under displacement orders, 684,000+ displaced since the March 2025 ceasefire breakdown, UNRWA still blocked from direct aid, 1,103 West Bank Palestinians killed (241 children). Harm attributed to Israel. Already at absolute harm-flag floor (0.0).

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Continued bombardment of Ukraine Jun 18-19; UN: June 2026 highest civilian-fatality month since the war began. Harm attributed to Russia. Already at absolute harm-flag floor (0.0).

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Western nations warned the UN HRC Jun 18 of an imminent RSF assault on al-Obeid (500,000 at risk); 10 days of drone strikes killed 50+ civilians; ICC prosecutor: atrocities 'repeated town by town'; 8.6M IDPs. Catastrophic escalation but already at absolute harm-flag floor (0.0).

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Whistleblower-retaliation suit (Devin Kim, Jun 8 2026) alleges termination after warning Grok's guardrails were inadequate against discrimination, bombmaking, and bioterrorism; complaint cites the later 'MechaHitler' incident and nonconsensual-imagery distribution. Reinforces the existing harm-flag floor (0.0); evidence-quality upgrade produces no composite delta.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: 784+ executions YTD (pace unmatched in decades), 126th consecutive Tuesday prison protest across 56 facilities, three protest-linked executions, 78 at imminent execution risk (Amnesty). Reinforces near-floor Critical; no headroom for a further scorable downgrade.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Bundibugyo Ebola escalating (837 cases / 196 deaths as of Jun 15; +29 cases/+4 deaths since Jun 16; Africa CDC warns could exceed the 2014 West Africa outbreak; burial team held hostage in Mongbwalu). Reinforces near-floor Critical (2.3); floor-limitation -> no composite delta.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Week 7+ protests (10 dead, 37 injured, 365 arrested, 103 blockades, $1.6B losses); emergency-powers legislation signed Jun 8; army authorized but NOT deployed. Same enabling-framework basis already behind the applied 6.3 (prior -6.5 applied; confirmed Jun 15 and 18). Near floor, no downside room.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Lean-season peak (part of 52.8M Sahel acute food insecurity); government/allied forces documented killing more than twice as many civilians as Islamist militants since 2023 (likely war crimes/CAH). Reinforces near-floor Critical; no scorable headroom.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Mali forces and Russian Africa Corps documented killing 3-4x more civilians than jihadists (summary executions, indiscriminate airstrikes, rape); 2026 offensives ongoing; WFP may halt assistance in July without $131M. State complicity consistent with published 12.5. No threshold crossing.

results.name: Devon Energy
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no fresh compassion-relevant adverse evidence in the window. Confirms at placeholder-grade Developing 25.0 (low-confidence desk review).

results.name: Murphy Oil
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no fresh adverse evidence. Confirms at placeholder-grade Developing 25.0 (low-confidence desk review).

results.name: PDC Energy
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no fresh adverse evidence (Chevron 2023 acquisition is a catalog-hygiene note). Confirms at placeholder-grade Developing 25.0 (low-confidence desk review).

results.name: Pioneer Natural Resources
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no fresh adverse evidence (ExxonMobil 2024 acquisition is a catalog-hygiene note). Confirms at placeholder-grade Developing 25.0 (low-confidence desk review).

results.name: Valero Energy
results.key_finding: March 2026 Port Arthur refinery explosion injured a worker and prompted a gross-negligence suit (pre-adjudication); Valero already at the Developing floor (23.4) with no band headroom and prior environmental settlements already in the record. Sub-threshold; no movement.

notes: 20 entities assessed (15 priority + 5 rotation backfill). Two change proposals: (1) Figure AI 37.5->31.3 (-6.2, downgrade, medium) on the Gruendel federal whistleblower complaint alleging absent safety governance, skull-fracture-capable force, a post-$39B-round safety-roadmap downgrade, and retaliation against the safety lead — AWR/BND/ACC/INT shaved from 2.5 to 2.0; stays Developing. (2) Nigeria 21.9->18.0 (-3.9, downgrade, medium) on the FAO-WFP/IPC escalation to IPC/CH Phase 5 Catastrophe for ~15,000 Borno residents and 34.8M at Phase 3+, framed by IRC as an 'entirely man-made, entirely preventable' famine; composite delta is below 5 points BUT the move crosses the Developing->Critical band boundary, a designation change that warrants the proposal under the band-crossing rule. Nigeria scored as failing to prevent/prioritize response (not primary perpetrator), so the magnitude is conservative. OpenAI (-4.7, 42-state AG probe) landed just below the 5-pt threshold with no band change -> confirmed, re-flag on charges. Apple (Towson NLRB charge) and Humana (re-surfaced already-priced-in PSI/OIG evidence) confirmed sub-threshold; Humana stays on boundary watch (0.6pt above 40.0). Floor-limitation methodology applied to Israel/Russia/Sudan/xAI-Grok (0.0 harm-flag floors) and Iran/DRC/Bolivia/Burkina Faso/Mali (near-floor critical): fresh adverse evidence reinforces but cannot lower scores already at/near floor. Ukraine harm correctly attributed to Russia (victim, not perpetrator) -> confirmed 50.0. Canonical-formula (computeCompositeFromDimensions, v1.2) reconstruction of every assessed baseline matched published within tolerance (OpenAI 27.5 vs 27.2 recompute = 0.3, under the 0.5 math-hygiene threshold; validate-indexes reports 0 errors). No math-hygiene flags. DRC slug 'democratic-republic-of-c' (rank 181, comp 2.3) is distinct from 'Republic of Congo' (rank 145, comp 20.3) — confirmed the correct DRC entry. Rotation-state updated for all 20 entities (last_assessed=2026-06-19; last_change_proposal set for figure-ai and nigeria).
